summary: Tested Raw Materials Firm-Agnostic Refactor (Issue #1) and related features. All 10 backend tests pass. Frontend AccountantInventory page works correctly after fixing 2 bugs.

issues: React key warnings: 'Encountered two children with the same key' - non-blocking but should be fixed for performance

action_items: Fix React key warnings in AccountantInventory - use unique keys combining item.id + firm_id + index for stock entries
seed_data_creation: Created test raw materials with SKU codes TEST-RM-* during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Raw materials are now firm-agnostic (global definitions with per-firm stock tracking via ledger). The old firm_id field has been removed from raw_materials collection. Stock is computed per firm from inventory_ledger entries. Frontend AccountantInventory page works correctly.

GET /api/raw-materials.returns_global_materials: PASSED - Returns all raw materials without firm filter
GET /api/raw-materials.includes_stock_by_firm: PASSED - Each material has stock_by_firm array with per-firm stock
GET /api/raw-materials.includes_total_stock: PASSED - Each material has total_stock computed from all firms

POST /api/raw-materials.creates_without_firm_id: PASSED - Creates global raw material definition
POST /api/raw-materials.returns_empty_stock_info: PASSED - New material has stock_by_firm=[] and total_stock=0

GET /api/raw-materials/{id}.returns_single_material: PASSED - Returns material with stock_by_firm array

GET /api/inventory/stock.returns_raw_materials_per_firm: PASSED - Shows raw materials with firm_id and firm_name
GET /api/inventory/stock.returns_all_item_types: PASSED - Returns raw_materials, finished_goods, master_skus arrays

POST /api/inventory/ledger.creates_entry_for_raw_material: PASSED - Ledger entry created with firm_id

GET /api/firms.returns_active_firms: PASSED - Returns list of active firms

accountant_inventory.page_loads: PASSED - No runtime errors after fix
accountant_inventory.raw_materials_tab: PASSED - Shows global raw materials with Total Stock column
accountant_inventory.current_stock_tab: PASSED - Shows Master SKUs with Firm, Type, Serial Numbers columns
accountant_inventory.firm_filter: PASSED - Filter by Firm dropdown present

backend.issue: MongoDB _id not excluded when returning created raw material

frontend.fix: Added productions state and API call to fetch production-requests
Changed masterSkus to skus (correct state variable name)
